items.h: Former WWE tag team confirmed for PROGRESS Wrestling tour
items.p: Former WWE tag team MxM (Mansoor and Mason Madden) have been confirmed for the upcoming PROGRESS Wrestling Odyssey Tour. The duo are currently signed to AEW, having made their Ring of Honor debut...

items.p: Before he competes for indie promotion 1FW tonight, AEW star Darby Allin helped bring some joy to a fan with special needs. 11Alive News in Georgia produced a story on Allin surprising a huge...

items.h: AEW Kept AEW Redemption Plans Close To The Vest Until The Day Matches Were Announced
items.p: AEW was reportedly tight-lipped about many of their AEW Redemption plans. The show is set to take place on July 26 at the Bell Centre in Montreal, Quebec. Multiple matches were announced for the...

items.h: AEW's Kyle Fletcher Talks Winning International Title In 'Ridiculous' Humidity
items.p: Kyle Fletcher has documented the day we won the AEW International Championship, and his battle against the humidity in Clearwater, Florida.

items.h: Will Ospreay Elaborates On Decision To Leave NJPW For AEW
items.p: Will Ospreay left NJPW after eight years for several reasons. He was able to keep his ties to the company when he joined AEW at Full Gear 2023.

items.h: Britt Baker supports AEW partner Rebel with ALS Ice Bucket Challenge
items.p: Britt Baker put out a video celebrating her AEW partner Rebel on Friday amid Rebel’s battle against ALS. After the trend went viral on social media in the 2010s, the ALS Ice Bucket Challenge has...
With this week's edition of "AEW Collision" being pre-taped in Boston, spoilers on the show's events and results have emerged.

items.h: Britt Baker Posts Ice Bucket Challenge Video In Support Of Former AEW Manager Rebel
items.p: The Ice Bucket Challenge has returned thanks to former NFL player, Chris Johnson. The challenge has reached the wrestling community in support of AEW's Rebel.

items.h: New title match confirmed for AEW Redemption
items.p: A World Tag Team title defense is now official for next weekend’s AEW Redemption. In a social post late Thursday night, AEW confirmed that Adam Copeland & Christian Cage will defend the titles...

items.h: Ethan Page Once Received Email From WWE Saying He'd Never Be Hired
items.p: Former AEW star Ethan Page has recalled his reaction after being told by WWE that he would never be signed by the promotion.
